action.reasoning: Observation: Just retrained 3 epochs with simulated codec aug, dev_eer={0.0006, 0.0030, 0.0029} - looks reasonable. Best.pt is from epoch 0 (val_eer=0.0006). I have ~7h, 10 iterations left. Need to evaluate this checkpoint on test. Analysis: Iter 6 baseline was 0.0956 with similar setup. Let me submit eval to see test EER.
